def negative_repeated_len_in_loop():
    rule_id = "repeated_len_in_loop"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Repeated len(...) checks inside loops when the receiver appears unchanged locally."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
